data.name: StreamLove Voyage
data.detailed_description:
「StreamLove Voyage」是一個有選擇的新穎遊戲。

Story

被召喚到遊戲世界的航，身邊居然出現了他推的VTuber忍野志乃！

她似乎也是在不知不覺間來到了這個世界。

為了回到原來的世界，兩人必須聯手完成遊戲管理員發佈的任務！努力通關！

▶ 明明怕得要死還要組隊打殭屍

▶ 紅著耳根手牽手假裝情侶上學

▶ 社恐女主角成為偶像練習生

▶ 穿越奇幻世界挑戰魔王副本

結果每次冒險都在放閃的航與志乃。

兩人的關係變得越發親密。

但當回到原來的世界時，他不過是個普通人而已，而她仍是螢幕中的虛擬偶像。

這波跨次元的戀愛最終會走向怎樣的結局呢——！？

Character

▶ 忍野 志乃

CV: Aji Sanma

「因為有主公看我，我才能堅持下去。如果沒有主公，志乃早就放棄了。」

來自忍者隱之村。

雖然擁有優秀的實力，但因為心理素質較弱，總被認為是忍者中的吊車尾。

為了提升忍者的認知度＆好感度開始直播，

但因為緊張而無法順利開口，甚至常常想不到話題而陷入沈默，

導致無法讓觀眾感到愉快。

儘管如此，她依然努力想成為大家需要的忍者，夢想有一天能擁有數百萬粉絲！

平時的戰鬥能力極高，只要不緊張或害怕，

就能輕鬆擊倒喪屍與怪物。

「志乃會保護主公的！」即便內心再害怕，她仍會鼓起勇氣奮戰！

Feature

  • E-mote 技術打造流暢細膩的角色動畫

  • 高品質 CG 呈現夢幻場景與心動瞬間

Staff

  • 角色設計：KATTO

  • 劇本：Masaki Zino

data.short_description: 現實與虛擬交錯！與 VTuber 女主角一同體驗甜蜜又令人心動的異世界戀愛故事吧！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: A pointing device required

data.name: StreamLove Voyage
data.detailed_description:
"StreamLove Voyage" is a novel game with choices.

Story

Wataru, the protagonist, was suddenly summoned into a world of game—

And right by his side was his favorite VTuber, Shino Oshino!

Apparently, she had also found herself in this world without knowing how.

To return to their original world, the two of them must complete the missions set by the Game Master and aim for victory!

Together, they face terrifying zombies while trembling in fear,

hold hands shyly as they walk to school,

watch as the introverted heroine becomes an idol candidate,

and embark on a journey through a fantasy world to defeat the Demon King.

Yet, no matter the adventure, Wataru and Shino always end up flirting.

As they spend more time together, their bond deepens.

But if they return to their original world, they will once again be just an ordinary man and a VTuber.

Where will their love story lead...?

Character

▶Shino Oshino

CV: Aji Sanma

"As long as you're watching over me, I can keep going.

If you weren't with me, I think I would have given up long ago."

Born in a hidden ninja village,

Shino is highly skilled but mentally fragile, making her a dropout as a ninja.

In an effort to raise popularity and appreciation for ninjas, she started streaming-

but her nerves always got the best of her. She struggled to speak,

couldn’t think of things to talk about,

and often fell silent, unable to entertain her viewers.

Still, she works hard, determined to become a ninja that people need.

One day, she dreams of reaching millions of subscribers...!

Her combat abilities are usually exceptional-

as long as she doesn't get too nervous or scared.

When she's focused, she can take down zombies and monsters with ease.

"I will protect you!" she declares,

pushing through her fears to stand by his side.

Feature

  • Smooth character animations powered by E-mote

  • High-quality event CG

Staff

  • Character Design: KATTO

  • Scenario: Masaki Zino

data.short_description: When reality meets the virtual! Dive into a sweet and exciting isekai romance with a VTuber heroine!
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: A pointing device required
